title: Allow Formula Columns in Calendar View
excerpt:
I have a formula that calculates the next anniversary date based on a date column. 
I want to create an “anniversary calendar” view that will show all those upcoming dates in a calendar view.  Unfortunately, the app only…

posts.author: BrianB23 (Brian Barnes)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a formula that calculates the next anniversary date based on a date column.

I want to create an “anniversary calendar” view that will show all those upcoming dates in a calendar view. Unfortunately, the app only supports date columns and doesn’t recognize the formula column - even though the column is dates.

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Brian,

You may want to take a look at this article: SOLVED – How to create a birthday calendar in monday.com.
